nasb.text: or ‘Who will descend into the abyss?’ (that is, to bring Christ up from the dead).”

esv.text: “or ‘Who will descend into the abyss?’” (that is, to bring Christ up from the dead).

cnv.text: 或是說：‘誰要下到深淵去呢？’”

ccb.text: 或说，‘谁要下到阴间去呢？’意思是谁要把基督从死人中领上来。”

csbs.text: “也不用说：谁要下到无底坑去？”——这意思是将基督从死人中领上来。
